title: Generating a Product Description
scenario: Write a prompt that gets an LLM to generate a product description (around 150-180 words) for a new smartwatch. The description should highlight the product's features, benefits, and target audience. Use a conversational tone and include a call-to-action.

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated description meets the word count and tone requirements.
Evaluates the relevance and accuracy of the product features, benefits, and target audience mentioned in the description.
Ensures the description is written in a conversational tone.
Verifies the description is properly formatted and easy to read.
